hypothesis: If the integrated workflow is applied to Ca2SiO4 synthesis within the Ca–Si–O–C–N–H–Al–B space at 800–1600°C, then the recipes designated as economically optimal will exhibit higher thermodynamic feasibility for Ca2SiO4 formation and lower total reactant cost than non-optimized recipes, because the workflow couples thermodynamic analysis, React-CA simulations, and commercial pricing to optimize both feasibility and cost.
